dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6888 IH: Trump Tariff Transparency Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Pettersen (for herself, Ms. Scholten, and Ms. Stevens) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Small Business

form.official-title: To require the Administrator of the Small Business Administration to report on certain costs of tariffs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Trump Tariff Transparency Act

section.header: Quarterly report on certain costs of tariffs

subsection.text: Not later than 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act, and quarterly thereafter, the Administrator of the Small Business Administration, in consultation with the Director of the Bureau of Economic Analysis, shall make publicly available a report on the average aggregate cost of tariffs imposed after January 20, 2025, to consumers and small business concerns (as defined in section 3 of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 632)).
The final quarterly report required under subsection (a) for a calendar year shall include the total annual cost of such tariffs to consumers and small business concerns.
